默认分类: 此条目的标题并非官方正式名称。
一旦官方名称揭晓，相关名称可能会随时改变。
虽然此版本可证明存在，但却无法从Minecraft启动器或别处下载到。
如果您有留档，请于讨论页提出。
Minecraft Indev►►: 0.31的一个版本发布于2010年2月4日15:41（UTC），更改了生物的行为。
常规: 现在可以主动避开悬崖、熔岩等障碍。
现在敌对生物会跟随24格内的玩家。
参考: Pathfinding mobs for fun and profit（存档） — The Word of Notch，2010年2月4日。

Everyone against the new update, post here（存档） — Minecraft Forum，2010年2月4日。“You're against pathfinding? You want the mobs to just randomly walk around and happily jump off cliffs? Sure, some new problems have been introduced, but it's the DEVELOPMENT version of the game. It's going to be unstable and buggy at times.”

Everyone against the new update, post here（存档） — Minecraft Forum，2010年2月4日。“So far, I can't really see a problem with it - Mobs come at me. Once they attack, it'll make sense. It'll also mean that they won't come at me if I'm too far away from them. I like it so far.”
